title: Gem Stickers Self Adhesive Gems for Crafts Sparkly Flatback Assorted Shapes Jewels Bling Rhinestone Stickers Crystal Sticker for DIY
features: Colorful Face Gem Stickers: Fantastic colors that make you shine like a star! This self adhesive gems kit comes with 422PCS multi-color craft jewels, including silver, red, blue, green, orange, pink, yellow, purple and so on. Different color meet your different needs.(Please note, colored gem stickers' color is random.)

Variety of Shapes and Size Gems for Crafts: Shapes of round, heart, oval, water drops and flower. A variety of shapes can decorate everything You like. The size of the gem stickers are at the range of 0.29cm to 1.57cm. Please refer the the pictures for detail information.

Self-adhesive Rhinestone Stickers: These bling flatback stickers are made of high quality acrylic with gorgeous colors, are suitable for various motifs for handicrafts or for professional use. They are self-adhesive and easy to stick. You are allowed to stick them on your crafts and projects. The strong stickiness can be maintained for a long time, not easy to fall off.
Awesome Gift: Rhinestone stickers are perfect for kid's crafts, they can use them decorate everything, such as treasure boxes, make up party, greeting cards, Absolutely, children will love them.

Wide range of applications: Suitable for decorative scrap-booking, photo frames, cell phones, handmade items, make-up, cups, vase, laptops, children's handicrafts, etc. Enjoy your time with these bling stickers!
Package Content: 6 sheet Rhinestone Bling Gem Stickers
